summary: Stress testing conducted on Proton2 using stressapptest and FIO to validate DC Cycling Cold Reset Ungraceful OS Shutdown During Rd/Wrt Traffic - Linux.

summary: App Direct Dependency Failure during Boot and BIOS update to PSE119N
evidence: HSD: [HSD-ES][server_platf][bug][purley][2205492723][p2-high][open] App Direct Dependency Failure during Boot. BMC (Primary) is Active with UEFI Pending 1.50 PSE119K.
nano /etc/default/grub GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX="<...> console=tty0 console=ttyS0,115200n8" and then "grub2-mkconfig -o /etc/grub2-efi.cfg"

summary: Creating persistent memory resources using ipmctl
evidence: ipmctl create -goal persistentmemorytype=appdirect and then "ipmctl show -memoryresources"

summary: DC Cycling Cold Reset Ungraceful OS Shutdown During Rd/Wrt Traffic
